records.Meetup Details in Brief: The day began at the iconic Gandhi Maidan, where students from across Bihar gathered with excitement. On the bus, icebreakers, songs, and laughter set the tone, making the journey itself full of fun and bonding. 🚍 We trekked up Dungeshwari Hills, hoisted the flag, and later explored Bodh Gaya, including the Mahabodhi Temple and monasteries 🌏. To close the day, we visited Vishnupad Temple, Sita Kund, and the Rubber Dam, before wrapping up with snacks and warm conversations at a café✨
Thank you to all the students for making this meet-up a success! Many more to come — Bhilai, get ready!
records.House/Society: Kaziranga X Sundarbans X Corbett X Nallamala X Bandipur X Namdapha X Saranda X Pichavaram X Gir X Kanha

records.Meetup Details in Brief: We recently had an amazing meetup for BS students in Patna, and it turned out to be such a wonderful experience!🤩We kicked off our meetup with loads of fun and excitement, capturing plenty of videos and reels along the way. Soon after, we began dancing Garba, and as the energy rose, it turned into a lively Bhojpuri dance-cum-Garba session! Everyone enjoyed themselves to the fullest. Later, we refreshed ourselves with some tasty refreshments, distributed gift hampers, and finally headed back home with lots of memories and smiles.😊❤️

records.Region: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Science City
records.Meetup Details in Brief: From digital classroom to the Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Science City! 🧬Sundarbans House touched down in Patna on February 1st for a day of discovery and connections. It wasn't just about exploring science; it was about building the chemistry that makes the students community so special.

Our Badminton Tournament at RKM26 Patna Chapter was all about energy, competition, and unstoppable spirit 🏸
We kicked things off by taking attendance and handing out wrist bands, setting the tone for a power-packed day. Without wasting a second, we jumped straight into the knockout rounds – intense rallies, powerful smashes, and pure focus on every point. The wind definitely tried to play its own game, but nothing could shake our momentum because the vibe was absolutely lit.
Midway, we took a quick break to refuel with protein bars, then got right back on court for the electrifying quarter finals. Another short pause meant cold drinks in hand, catching our breath while the excitement kept building. The semi-finals raised the bar even higher, and by the time we reached the finals, the competition was fierce, fun, and unforgettable.
Every match brought cheers, laughter, and that winning spirit that makes tournaments special. We wrapped it all up with a proud prize distribution ceremony, celebrating the champions and every single participant who gave it their all. And of course, what’s a tournament without good food? Burgers and ice cream made the perfect ending to an action-filled day.

Despite the wind trying to challenge us, the energy never dropped – it was competitive, it was fun, and it was a complete smash hit! 🔥🏸
records.House/Society: Sundarbans X Kaziranga X Nallamala X Sportify

records.Meetup Details in Brief: Patna Holi Meetup Recap: That was a blast! 🎨✨ From the first splash of Gulaal to the last dance at Sheesh Mahal, the IITM BS Holi Meetup was pure magic. records.Meetup Details in Brief:
🏆✨ AND THAT'S A WRAP! THE CHAMPIONS ARE HERE! ✨🏆                                                                                                                      From intense group-stage battles to a thrilling grand finale, the journey has been nothing short of spectacular. 💥🏏                                                                                                                                                                                   🔥 Kanha & Nallamala House rise as the ultimate champions, lifting the trophy with dominance, teamwork, and pure passion! 🏆💪                                                                                                                                                                                         A massive shoutout to Gir & Pichavaram Team for putting up a fierce fight till the very end — true sportsmanship and spirit on display! 👏🔥                                                                                                                                 From 12 teams to one champion, this wasn’t just a tournament — it was a celebration of unity, competition, and unforgettable moments. ❤️                                                                                                                                                                     🙌 Huge thanks to the entire organizing team, players, and everyone who made this event legendary.                        Champions: 🏆 Kanha & Nallamala
                                                               Runners-up: 🥈 Gir & Pichavaram                                              See you in the next season… bigger, better, stronger! 🚀🏏

records.Region: Gandhi Museum, Charkha Park, Satyagrah Smarak
records.Meetup Details in Brief: ✨ IITM BS First Motihari Meetup ✨                                                        What a memorable and fun-filled day with amazing people! 💙                                                                                         We started our meetup at Charkha Park 🌿, where we enjoyed fun games, activities, laughter, and lots of great conversations together. After that, we visited the Gandhi Museum and Gandhi Smarak 🕊️, where we explored and learned many inspiring things about Mahatma Gandhi Ji and his life.                         The day became even more special with a delicious lunch at the restaurant 🍽️ and beautiful memories shared with fellow BS students.                                               From online classmates to real-life friendships, this meetup was truly unforgettable! 🤝✨                                                        A big thank you to the IIT Madras BS team @iitmadras_bs for sponsoring this amazing event through the BS Student Activity Fee. Your support truly made this meetup possible!
